inputs.label: Current Body Fat (%)
inputs.businessContext: Current body fat percentage (measured by caliper, DXA, or bioimpedance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current body fat percentage (measured by caliper, DXA, or bioimpedance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut vücut yağ yüzdesi (kaliper, DXA veya biyoempedans ile ölçülmüş).
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Körperfettanteil in Prozent (gemessen mit Kaliper, DXA oder Bioimpedanz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage actuel de graisse corporelle (mesuré par pied à coulisse, DXA ou bioimpédance).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de grasa corporal actual medido con calibre, DXA o bioimpedancia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الدهون الحالية في الجسم (مقاسة بالفرجار أو DXA أو المقاومة الحيوية).

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age (years). To account for metabolic changes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age (years). To account for metabolic changes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş (yıl). Metabolik değişikliklerin hesaba katılması için.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge (ans). Pour tenir compte des changements métaboliques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad (años). Para tener en cuenta cambios metabólicos.

inputs.label: Activity Level
inputs.businessContext: Physical activity multiplier (1.2 sedentary, 1.375 light, 1.55 moderate, 1.725 very active, 1.9 heavy training).

businessContext_i18n.en: Physical activity multiplier (1.2 sedentary, 1.375 light, 1.55 moderate, 1.725 very active, 1.9 heavy training).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel aktivite çarpanı (1.2 sedanter, 1.375 hafif, 1.55 orta, 1.725 çok aktif, 1.9 ağır antrenman).
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewegungsfaktor (1,2 sitzend, 1,375 leicht, 1,55 mäßig, 1,725 sehr aktiv, 1,9 schweres Training).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient d'activité physique (1,2 sédentaire, 1,375 léger, 1,55 modéré, 1,725 très actif, 1,9 entraînement intensif).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de actividad física (1.2 sedentario, 1.375 ligero, 1.55 moderado, 1.725 muy activo, 1.9 entrenamiento intenso).
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل النشاط البدني (1.2 خامل، 1.375 خفيف، 1.55 متوسط، 1.725 نشط جدًا، 1.9 تدريب شاق).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
